## Title: Fix incorrect array sizing in NR PSS time search for sidelink mode

### Summary
The `pss_search_time_nr` function in the NR UE PSS search module incorrectly allocates a fixed-size array for correlation averaging, causing out-of-bounds memory access in sidelink mode. The `avg` array was hardcoded to `NUMBER_PSS_SEQUENCE` elements, but when sidelink mode is active (`sl_mode != 0`), the downstream logic iterates over `NUMBER_PSS_SEQUENCE_SL` elements. This mismatch leads to undefined beha
